/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/main_linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/AppSettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/AudioEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/JackPortEnum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/ControlBar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/PluginSlot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/PluginDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/ParameterPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/linux/SettingsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/LiveEffectEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/FileWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opiqo.dir/src/LockFreeQueue.cpp.o -o opiqo  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib64/pipewire-0.3/jack: -lmp3lame -lopus -lopusenc -lFLAC -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib64/libgtk-4.so /usr/lib64/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib64/libcairo.so /usr/lib64/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib64/libvulkan.so /usr/lib64/libgraphene-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib64/pipewire-0.3/jack/libjack.so /usr/lib64/liblilv-0.so /usr/lib64/libsndfile.so /usr/lib64/libogg.so /usr/lib64/libvorbis.so /usr/lib64/libvorbisenc.so
